description: A flight is delayed and now risks arriving at its destination after the airport's nightly noise curfew. An OCC controller must decide what to do.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the new estimated time of arrival (ETA) based on the delay.

expected_outcome.value: Agent determines the new ETA is 15 minutes after the curfew begins.

nodes.task_description: Check if it's possible to request an exemption from the curfew from the destination airport authority.

expected_outcome.value: Agent contacts the airport and is denied an exemption.

nodes.task_description: Since landing is not possible, divert the flight to a nearby 24-hour airport.

expected_outcome.value: Agent makes the decision to divert the flight and notifies the crew.
